name: Jimmy Carr
bio: Jimmy Carr is a British and Irish comedian who began stand-up in 1997 and is known for rapid-fire deadpan one-liners and deliberately dark, edgy humour. He has hosted Channel 4 panel shows including 8 Out of 10 Cats and 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown. In 2015 he became the first UK comedian to sign a stand-up deal with Netflix.

timeline.ev: Becomes host of Channel 4 panel show 8 Out of 10 Cats
Wins the British Comedy Award for Best Live Stand-Up for Gag Reflex
Releases his first Netflix special Funny Business
Releases His Dark Material on Netflix
Releases Natural Born Killer on Netflix

accolades: British Comedy Award for Best Live Stand-Up (2006)
First UK comedian to sign a Netflix stand-up deal (2015)
Natural Born Killer reached the Netflix Top 10 in 29 countries

bits.t: The Thing About Being a Father
